exceptions.BotMissingPermissions: I do not have the required permissions to execute it.
exceptions.CheckFailure: You do not have permission to use this command.
exceptions.CommandAlreadyRegistered: The command were already registered before.
exceptions.CommandInvokeError: An error occured while executing the command.
exceptions.CommandLimitReached: The command usage is currently limited due to command limitation.
exceptions.CommandOnCooldown: The command is on cooldown. Please try again after passing %{remaining} more seconds.
exceptions.CommandSignatureMismatch: The command has out of sync from latest one.
exceptions.HTTPException: The operation has failed due to HTTP Error.
exceptions.MissingAnyRole: You do not have any of required roles to use it.
exceptions.MissingPermissions: You do not have required permissions to use it.
exceptions.MissingRole: You do not have required role to use it.
exceptions.NoPrivateMessage: The command cannot be used on private messages.
exceptions.TransformerError: An error occured while processing command arguments.
exceptions.TranslationError: An error occured while translating the command.

http.400: Error 400: Bad Request. Input contains invalid syntax.
http.403: Error 403: Forbidden. You do not have permission to access the resource.
http.404: Error 404: Not Found. There's no file exist.
http.429: Error 429: Too Many Requests. API has ratelimit client. Try again later.
http.500: Error 500: Internal Server Error. Server has encountered unknown error while processing.
